arts.ttl: Brentford net 1st-min goal in third straight game
arts.sum: Brentford made Premier League history on Saturday as they became the first team to score in the opening minute of a match three games in a row.

arts.ttl: Brentford set remarkable Premier League scoring record
arts.sum: Find a better duo than Brentford and early goals in the Premier League. The Bees have been making a habit of it lately. Two weeks ago Yoane Wissa stunned champions Manchester City when headed the ball in from close range after just 22 seconds. Seven days later Bryan Mbeumo opened the scoring against Tottenham Hotspur […] The post Brentford set remarkable Premier League scoring record first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Todibo, Souček and Antonio recalled at Brentford
arts.sum: Alphonse Areola starts in goal, seeking his second clean sheet of the season and third of 2024, with a back four in front of him of Aaron Wan-Bissaka, Todibo, Maximilian Kilman and Emerson. With Álvarez unavailable, the substitutes’ bench will be comprised of Mavropanos, Summerville, goalkeeper Łukasz Fabiański, full-backs Vladimír Coufal and Aaron Cresswell, midfielders Carlos Soler and Andy Irving, winger Luis Guilherme and striker Danny Ings.

arts.ttl: West Ham join Aston Villa in the race to sign 23-year-old Serie A attacker
arts.sum: West Ham United are reportedly keen on signing the AC Milan winger Samuel Chukwueze. The 23-year-old has not been able to hit the ground running in Italian football since the move from Villarreal and he is already being linked with an exit from the Italian club. arts.ttl: Brentford vs West Ham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The Spaniard has endured a nightmarish start to his tenure at the London Stadium, and a 3-0 defeat to Chelsea last weekend meant West Ham had lost their first three home games of the new season for the very first time in the club's 129-year history. Saturday's hosts have lost just once to the Irons in the Premier League, although West Ham did triumph in their most recent meeting back in February.
